title: Beef and Citrus Steak
description: A flavorful steak dish with a hint of citrus, perfect for a quick dinner. The combination of beef and citrus creates a refreshing twist on a classic steak recipe.

ingredients.name: Steak
ingredients.notes: ribeye or strip loin work well

instructions: Season the steak with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the steak for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake the steak for 8-12 minutes, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the steak is cooking, roll out the flaky pastry and cut it into strips.
Remove the steak from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes.
Wrap the steak in pastry strips, securing with toothpicks if needed.
Zest the citrus over the steak and serve immediately.
Serve the steak with your choice of sides, such as roasted vegetables or mashed potatoes.
